overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit skyscrapers, wet reflective streets, and the iconic Marmur Bank building. The footage is clearly from a high-end game engine (Cyberpunk 2077) with ray-traced reflections and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy downtown street with large digital billboard

events.description: pedestrian in red hoody passes close by on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down rain-soaked sidewalk past illuminated billboards and street signs

notable_agents.action: walking past camera wearing red hoody and light-colored shorts

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard displaying motorcycle advertisement with red and white graphics
street sign indicating speed limit of 40 mounted on a pole

segments.scene_description: The video opens on a rain-soaked cyberpunk street at night, with a large illuminated billboard on the left and glass towers rising on the right. The camera walks forward along the wet sidewalk, passing a pedestrian in a red hoody who walks past on the left. The pavement reflects the neon lights from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside elevated tram tracks with neon storefronts

events.description: passing the neon-lit Abandon store entrance on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk next to the tram barrier, moving past various storefronts

entered.detail: black metal barrier with yellow neon trim separating sidewalk from street and tram tracks
storefront sign with green and red neon lettering reading ABANDON

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a section of street lined with a distinctive black tram barrier featuring yellow neon trim on the left. The camera walks past the Abandon store with its glowing neon sign on the right. Palm trees are visible in the distance, and the wet pavement continues to reflect the city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching Marmur Bank building with prominent corporate signage

events.description: Marmur Bank neon sign becomes visible ahead on the left, dominating the skyline

agents.ego_description: walking toward the illuminated Marmur Bank building, observing traffic on the left

notable_agents.action: multiple cars driving on the wet street alongside the tram tracks

entered.detail: tall dark corporate building with massive illuminated Marmur Bank signage in white and red neon
corporate logo and signage for Delamain on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The Marmur Bank building emerges into view on the left, its massive neon sign glowing brightly against the night sky. The camera continues walking forward along the tram line, passing the Delamain corporate building on the right. Traffic moves steadily on the wet street to the left, with vehicle headlights cutting through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow sidewalk beyond Marmur Bank following a pedestrian ahead

events.description: camera begins following a pedestrian in white jacket walking ahead on the narrowing path

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian ahead along the narrowing sidewalk as the street becomes more enclosed

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and dark pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having passed the Marmur Bank building, the sidewalk narrows and becomes more enclosed by building walls. The camera follows a pedestrian in a white jacket walking ahead into the distance. The tram barrier continues alongside on the left but recedes into the background as the street opens slightly ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district, moving from wide, neon-lit boulevards toward a more enclosed urban corridor. It begins on a wet sidewalk beneath towering glass skyscrapers and a massive illuminated billboard, passing a pedestrian in a red hoody as neon lights shimmer on the pavement. As the camera advances, the view shifts to a street lined with a black and yellow neon tram barrier on the left and the glowing sign of the Abandon store on the right. The scene then opens up to reveal the massive, brightly lit Marmur Bank building on the left and the Delamain corporate building on the right, with vehicle headlights cutting through the rain on the adjacent road. Finally, the perspective narrows as the camera follows a pedestrian in a white jacket into a more confined space where the surrounding walls close in and the tram barrier recedes into the distance.
